indicators.name: large palm tree
indicators.rationale: The presence of a large palm tree obstructs the open floor space required for yoga practice.

indicators.name: partial obstruction of floor
indicators.rationale: The tree partially obstructs the open floor area, reducing the available space for yoga.

indicators.name: light-colored wall
indicators.rationale: A light-colored wall can create a calming atmosphere conducive to yoga.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is moderately suitable for yoga due to the obstruction caused by the large palm tree. While the light-colored wall contributes to a calming atmosphere, the tree's presence significantly reduces the available open floor space required for yoga practice. A score of 3 reflects the partial obstruction of the floor and the need for more open space.
